examples: So this paper does certain researches on ommateum and some ATR techniques are proposed in this paper.
The ommatidial surface ultrastructure of ommateum of 6 butterfly species were observed with scanning electronic microscope.
One point-detector imitates facet in ommateum , image detector imitates one whole ommateum , and it's visual function. Object's 3-D information is got using two point-detectors.
